ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "race_length_km" REAL /* Total length of the race in kilometers */,
  "number_of_stages" INTEGER /* Number of stages in the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., rally, hill climb) */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., gravel, tarmac) */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., F, E) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit for the class */,
  "allowed_modifications" TEXT /* Allowed modifications for the class */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type allowed for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "car_number" INTEGER /* Number of the car */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the car */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity of the car */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "car_color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the crew member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., Driver, Co-driver) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the crew member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "total_penalty" TEXT /* Total penalty time for the car */,
  "class_position" INTEGER /* Position of the car in its class */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position of the car */,
  "diff_from_leader" TEXT /* Time difference from the leader */,
  "diff_from_ahead" TEXT /* Time difference from the car ahead */,
  "stage_points" INTEGER /* Points earned in each stage */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the race */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time of the car */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the car during the race */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_crew" (
  "car_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car-crew association */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member started working with the car */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member stopped working with the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_crew_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "stage_number" INTEGER /* Number of the stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the stage */,
  "stage_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the stage */,
  "stage_length_km" REAL /* Length of the stage in kilometers */,
  "stage_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the stage */,
  "stage_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_schedule_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stage_results" (
  "stage_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race result */,
  "stage_number" INTEGER /* Number of the stage */,
  "stage_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the stage */,
  "stage_position" INTEGER /* Position of the car in the stage */,
  "stage_speed" REAL /* Speed of the car in the stage */,
  "stage_temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the stage */,
  "stage_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stage_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, team manager, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
